title: Lexen i18n config
description: Configuration file for the lexen i18n key extractor (i18n.config.json).

name.description: Exact function name of the hook (e.g. "useTranslations", "getTranslations", or "useTranslation").

package.description: Import source filter — only hook calls imported from this package are matched (e.g. "next-intl" or "next-intl/server").

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference — enables editor autocomplete and validation.

srcDir.description: Root directory lexen scans for translation calls, relative to the project root (e.g. "src").

locales.description: List of locale codes to maintain (e.g. ["en", "ru"]). All locale files must be present for each namespace.

defaultLocale.description: The primary locale whose values are treated as the source of truth. Must be one of the entries in `locales`.

filePatterns.description: Glob patterns (relative to srcDir) of files to scan for translation calls (e.g. ["**/*.{ts,tsx}"]).

ignore.description: Glob patterns of files to exclude from scanning (e.g. ["**/*.d.ts"]).

hook.description: The namespace-binding hook(s) lexen tracks. A single object for one hook (e.g. useTranslations from next-intl), or an array to track several (e.g. also getTranslations from next-intl/server). Each binds a namespace from its first string argument; `await getTranslations('ns')` is handled.

layout.description: Template paths that describe where locale JSON files live on disk.

feature.description: Path template for per-feature locale files. Supports {namespace} and {locale} placeholders (e.g. "features/{namespace}/locales/{locale}.json").

widget.description: Path template for widget locale files. Supports {namespace} and {locale} (e.g. "widgets/{namespace}/locales/{locale}.json").

widgetNamespacePrefix.description: Prefix used in useTranslations() calls to identify widget namespaces (e.g. "widget").

global.description: Path template for the global/shared messages file. Supports {locale} (e.g. "i18n/messages/{locale}.json").

globalNamespace.description: Namespace string that resolves to the global messages file (e.g. "common").

featuresDir.description: Directory that contains all feature sub-directories, used for namespace discovery (e.g. "features").

widgetsDir.description: Directory that contains all widget sub-directories, used for namespace discovery (e.g. "widgets").

preserve.description: Keys that lexen's static analysis cannot see, keyed by namespace. "*" preserves all keys; an array preserves keys matching the listed prefixes. Preserved keys survive --clean.

oneOf.description: Preserve every key under this namespace.
Preserve keys matching these prefix strings (e.g. "prefix.*" or "exactKey").

resolver.description: Strategy for resolving non-literal translation arguments. "ast" (default) handles only string literals; "typechecker" uses the TypeScript compiler to resolve identifier types.

propFlow.description: Enable tracing of the `t` function passed as a prop back to its useTranslations() origin. Only effective when mode is "typechecker".

tsconfig.description: Path to the tsconfig.json lexen uses for the typechecker program, relative to the project root.

calls.description: Config-driven extractors for builder functions that consume translation keys directly (e.g. buildMetadata({namespace, key})).

callee.description: Function name(s) to match at call sites.

package.description: Import-source filter — only call sites imported from this module are matched.

arg.description: Index of the object-literal argument to inspect (default 0).

namespace.description: How to extract the namespace from the object argument.

prop.description: Property name whose value is the namespace string.

default.description: Fallback namespace used when the prop is absent at a call site.

keys.description: Key templates. ${propName} holes are filled from the object argument's properties, cartesian-expanded across all holes.

defaults.description: Literal fallbacks for props absent at a given call site.
